title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at EY India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at EY India
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!
